AuditEventOut.description:
Metadata-only projection of an ``audit_event`` — the chain identity, the who/what/when, the
outcome/severity, and the tamper-evidence hash. NO payload bodies.
AuditEventOut.title: AuditEventOut

HoldingOut.description:
A single as-of holding — stored position fields only (+ optional display-only mark). NO
computed/aggregate field (no market_value, exposure, total, weight).
HoldingOut.title: HoldingOut

HoldingsOut.description:
The as-of holdings list for a portfolio (or bounded subtree). A LIST, never an aggregate —
there is no total/sum/rollup field anywhere in this schema.
HoldingsOut.title: HoldingsOut

LatestValidationOut.description: The operative (most recent) validation record for a version, surfaced on the detail read.
LatestValidationOut.title: LatestValidationOut

MarkOut.description: Display-only captured mark (present only when ``include_marks=true`` and a mark exists).
MarkOut.title: MarkOut

ValidationDetailOut.description:
The per-validation detail (API-1 F2): the lean summary fields PLUS the heavy sub-objects
(``findings`` + ``evidence``) that the summary list deliberately omits.
ValidationDetailOut.title: ValidationDetailOut

get.description:
The acting tenant's audit trail (metadata-only), newest-first, filtered + paginated. Gated
``lineage.view``; silent-empty; NEVER exposes another tenant's events (tenant RLS + an explicit
tenant predicate). Read-only — the frozen append-only writer is untouched.

schema.title: Response List Audit Events Endpoint Audit Events Get

get.description: All current benchmark definitions for the acting tenant.

schema.title: Response List Benchmarks Endpoint Benchmarks Get

post.description: Capture a benchmark DEFINITION (EV; REFERENCE.CREATE + VENDOR_BENCHMARK ORIGIN lineage).

get.description: The current-head index-level series for a benchmark (tenant-scoped).

schema.title: Response List Benchmark Levels Endpoint Benchmarks  Benchmark Id  Levels Get

post.description: Capture the first open index level for (benchmark, level_date, level_type).

get.description: Bitemporal as-of read of an index level (fail-closed on unknown benchmark / no version).

post.description: As-known restatement (system-time) of an index level; a corrected version.
Effective-dated re-capture of an index level (valid-time; a new version).
Capture a membership set for (benchmark, effective_date) as ONE governed unit.

get.description: The membership set for (benchmark, effective_date) as-of (valid_at, known_at).

post.description: As-known restatement of a (benchmark, effective_date) membership (same valid period).
Effective-dated re-capture of a (benchmark, effective_date) membership (fresh set).

get.description: The current-head vendor-published-return series for a benchmark (tenant-scoped).

schema.title: Response List Benchmark Returns Endpoint Benchmarks  Benchmark Id  Returns Get

post.description: Capture the first open vendor-published return for (benchmark, return_date, type, basis).

get.description: Bitemporal as-of read of a vendor return (fail-closed on unknown benchmark / no version).

post.description: As-known restatement (system-time) of a vendor-published return; a corrected version.
Effective-dated re-capture of a vendor-published return (valid-time; a new version).
Apply attribute changes to a benchmark DEFINITION in place (EV; REFERENCE.UPDATE).

get.description:
Capital-call events (reversal rows included — Σ(amount) is self-correcting),
optionally filtered by portfolio and/or instrument (rule 7).
THE READ RULE (OD-CC-1-D): this event does NOT feed
TWR/Dietz or backtest realized P&L; a cash movement in a return-modeled book must be
separately posted as a transaction — nothing auto-bridges.

post.description:
Record one capital-call event (requires a CURRENT commitment for the pair; the event
currency must equal the commitment's). Append-only — there is no edit/delete.
THE READ RULE (OD-CC-1-D): this event does NOT feed
TWR/Dietz or backtest realized P&L; a cash movement in a return-modeled book must be
separately posted as a transaction — nothing auto-bridges.

Append the FULL reversal of a capital call (amount = the exact negation; emits
PRIVATE.CAPITAL_CALL_REVERSE). A reversal cannot be reversed; one reversal per event.
THE READ RULE (OD-CC-1-D): this event does NOT feed
TWR/Dietz or backtest realized P&L; a cash movement in a return-modeled book must be
separately posted as a transaction — nothing auto-bridges.

get.description:
Current-head commitments, optionally filtered by portfolio and/or instrument (the
rule-7 entity-filtered read).

post.description:
Capture the first open commitment for a (portfolio, fund-instrument) pair — a MANUAL
ORIGIN edge + PRIVATE.COMMITMENT_CREATE + the DQ gate. Both FK targets re-resolved
tenant-filtered pre-write (a foreign/absent portfolio or instrument is a 422).

get.description:
The commitment true at ``valid_at`` as KNOWN at ``known_at`` (both-axes bitemporal
read; read-only, no aggregation). 404 if no version covers both instants.

post.description:
Effective-dated re-capture (a successive close / amendment) for the SAME pair.
``currency_code`` is chain-immutable — a differing currency is a 422.

get.description:
The as-of head curve (header + nodes) for each curve_date in [from, to] for a logical key —
read-only.

post.description:
Capture a curve (header + its node set, one governed unit: VENDOR-source ORIGIN lineage +
MARKET.CURVE_CREATE + the DQ gate).

get.description:
The single head curve (header + pinned nodes) for a logical key as-of (valid_at, known_at)
— 404 if none.

post.description:
As-known vendor restatement of a specific curve version (same valid period + logical key +
fresh node set).

Effective-dated re-capture for the SAME logical key of an existing head (new version + fresh
node set).

get.description:
Distribution events, optionally filtered by portfolio and/or instrument (rule 7).
THE READ RULE (OD-CC-1-D): this event does NOT feed
TWR/Dietz or backtest realized P&L; a cash movement in a return-modeled book must be
separately posted as a transaction — nothing auto-bridges.

post.description:
Record one distribution event (``is_recallable`` is captured as data; its unfunded
interpretation is the CC-2 projection's, not this capture's).
THE READ RULE (OD-CC-1-D): this event does NOT feed
TWR/Dietz or backtest realized P&L; a cash movement in a return-modeled book must be
separately posted as a transaction — nothing auto-bridges.

Append the FULL reversal of a distribution (incl. the ``is_recallable`` echo).
THE READ RULE (OD-CC-1-D): this event does NOT feed
TWR/Dietz or backtest realized P&L; a cash movement in a return-modeled book must be
separately posted as a transaction — nothing auto-bridges.

schema.title: Response List Results Dq Results Get
Response List Rules Dq Rules Get

get.description:
API-1 entity/time read: exposure-aggregate rows across COMPLETED runs filtered by
``portfolio_id``/``instrument_id`` + an optional ``as_of`` run cutoff (a run spans the portfolio
SUBTREE, so the filter row-filters to the queried book; silent-empty on a foreign id). Each row
carries ``calculation_run_id`` — cross-run aggregation is a CONSUMER ERROR.

schema.title: Response List Exposure By Entity Endpoint Exposure Get

get.description:
API-1 latest-resolver: the newest COMPLETED exposure run's rows for the portfolio (empty
when none).

schema.title: Response Latest Exposure Endpoint Exposure Latest Get

get.description:
List the tenant's EXPOSURE_AGGREGATE runs, newest first (gated ``exposure.view`` — the
sibling of ``GET /risk/runs`` for the exposure family; read-only; fail-closed filters). The
query param is ``status`` (aliased — the FastAPI ``status`` module shadows the name).

post.description:
Run a governed exposure aggregation. A pre-create refusal raises + rolls back (no run); a
post-create FAILED run is committed (``status='FAILED'``, zero rows).

get.description:
Read an exposure run + its rows (tenant-scoped; read-only). Returns the REAL run envelope —
a committed FAILED run (zero rows) is surfaced with ``status='FAILED'`` (the durable refusal
evidence a 3L auditor reviews), NOT a 404 (reserved for an unknown/cross-tenant run).
Read a single ``exposure_aggregate`` row (tenant-scoped; read-only).
All current factor definitions for the acting tenant.

schema.title: Response List Factors Endpoint Factors Get

post.description: Capture a factor DEFINITION (EV; REFERENCE.CREATE + VENDOR_FACTOR ORIGIN lineage).

Effective-dated re-capture of a factor return (valid-time; a new version).
Apply attribute changes to a factor DEFINITION in place (EV; REFERENCE.UPDATE).

get.description: The as-of head rate for each rate_date in [from, to] for a (pair, rate_type) — read-only.

schema.title: Response List Fx Rates Fx Get

post.description:
Capture an FX rate (governed: VENDOR-source ORIGIN lineage + MARKET.FX_CREATE + the DQ
gate).

get.description: The single head rate for a logical key as-of (valid_at, known_at) — 404 if none.

Convert an amount between currencies as-of using PUBLISHED rates only (direct / reciprocal /
triangulation-through-base). Read-only (no audit/lineage/DQ); fails closed → 404 if no path.

post.description:
As-known vendor restatement of a specific fx_rate version (same valid period + logical
key).
Effective-dated re-quote for the SAME (pair, rate_date, rate_type) of an existing head.

schema.title: Response List Batches Ingest Batches Get

post.description:
Assign/re-assign the model's tier from the dual ratings (MG-1, OD-MG-1-B/C). A 2L act —
gated on `model.validate` (HOUSE POLICY per OD-MG-1-C; the 1L register-time write is closed).
Emits MODEL.TIER_ASSIGN with the ratings + rationale in the payload (their durable home).

get.description:
The per-validation detail read (API-1 F2): the summary fields + its findings + evidence.
404-indistinguishable if the validation is hidden/unknown OR does not belong to a version of
the URL's model (no cross-model / existence-oracle leak).

schema.title: Response List Version Validations Models  Model Id  Versions  Version Id  Validations Get

post.description:
Register (idempotently) the governed pacing model + a model_version for this
``(code_version, rc_schedule, fund_life, bow, growth, yield_floor, functional_form=TA)``
identity and return its id (OD-CC-2-B — the FIVE declared parameters are version identity;
a same-label re-register with a different declaration is a 409; invalid parameters are a 422).
NO numeric constant is minted from Takahashi-Alexander — only the FUNCTIONAL FORM is TA's.

get.description:
The rule-7 entity/time-centric read (OD-CC-2-F): projected rows across COMPLETED runs for the
(portfolio, instrument) pair, optionally as of a run cutoff (``as_of``: resolution scoped to
runs with ``system_from <= as_of``). FLAT rows each carrying ``calculation_run_id`` +
``model_version_id``; total ordering (run ``system_from`` DESC, run_id DESC, ``period_index``
ASC). **Cross-run aggregation is a CONSUMER ERROR** — a pair may hold several runs (e.g.
successive versions); discriminate by ``calculation_run_id``. Silent-empty on an unknown/foreign
id (the positions/valuations entity-filter precedent).

The platform's FIRST latest-resolver (OD-CC-2-F): the newest COMPLETED projection run for the
(portfolio, instrument) pair across ALL model versions ("current" = the latest run), as of an
optional run cutoff (``as_of=None`` means now — ONE code path), returned as its period rows.
404 when the pair has no COMPLETED projection. Cross-run aggregation is a CONSUMER ERROR: this
resolver returns exactly ONE run's rows; use ``GET /pacing/projections`` for the full set.
Read a single ``pacing_projection_result`` row (tenant-scoped; read-only).

post.description:
Run a governed commitment-pacing projection. Provide EITHER ``snapshot_id`` (consume an
existing ``PACING_INPUT`` snapshot) OR ``portfolio_id`` + ``instrument_id`` (build one first) —
exactly one form. A pre-create refusal raises + rolls back (no run); a post-create FAILED run is
committed (``status='FAILED'``, zero rows — the magnitude envelope).

get.description:
Read a pacing run + its projected period rows (tenant-scoped; read-only). A committed FAILED
run (zero rows) is surfaced with ``status='FAILED'`` (durable refusal evidence), NOT a 404.

API-1 entity/time read: benchmark-relative rows across COMPLETED runs, filtered by
``portfolio_id``/``benchmark_id`` and/or an ``as_of`` run cutoff (silent-empty on a foreign
id). Each row carries ``calculation_run_id`` — cross-run aggregation is a CONSUMER ERROR.

schema.title: Response List Benchmark Relatives By Entity Endpoint Perf Benchmark Relative Get

get.summary: List Benchmark Relatives By Entity Endpoint

get.description:
API-1 latest-resolver: the newest COMPLETED benchmark-relative run's rows for the portfolio
(optionally pinned to a benchmark; empty when none).

schema.title: Response Latest Benchmark Relative Endpoint Perf Benchmark Relative Latest Get

post.description:
Run a governed ex-post benchmark-relative calculation. A pre-create refusal raises + rolls
back (no run — incl. a currency mismatch, a zero-benchmark-window, or a linkage mismatch,
422/404/409); a post-create FAILED run is committed (``status='FAILED'``, zero rows — the
magnitude gate).

get.description:
Read a benchmark-relative run + its series rows (tenant-scoped; read-only). A committed
FAILED run (zero rows) is surfaced with ``status='FAILED'`` (durable refusal evidence), NOT a
404.
Read a single ``benchmark_relative_result`` row (tenant-scoped; read-only).

API-1 entity/time read: desmoothed-return rows across COMPLETED runs, filtered by
``portfolio_id``/``instrument_id`` and/or an ``as_of`` run cutoff (silent-empty on a foreign
id). Each row carries ``calculation_run_id`` — cross-run aggregation is a CONSUMER ERROR.

schema.title: Response List Desmoothed Results By Entity Endpoint Perf Desmoothed Returns Get

get.summary: List Desmoothed Results By Entity Endpoint

get.description:
API-1 latest-resolver: the newest COMPLETED desmoothing run's rows for the (portfolio,
instrument) series (empty when none).

schema.title: Response Latest Desmoothed Result Endpoint Perf Desmoothed Returns Latest Get

post.description:
Run a governed Geltner desmoothing. A pre-create refusal raises + rolls back (no run —
incl. a short/duplicate/non-positive/mixed-currency mark series, 422/404/409); a post-create
FAILED run is committed (``status='FAILED'``, zero rows — the magnitude gate).

get.description:
Read a desmoothed-return run + its series rows (tenant-scoped; read-only). A committed
FAILED run (zero rows) is surfaced with ``status='FAILED'``, NOT a 404.
Read a single ``desmoothed_return_result`` row (tenant-scoped; read-only).

post.description:
Register (idempotently) the governed ex-post benchmark-relative model + a model_version for
this ``code_version`` identity and return its id (OD-P3-8-A — the v1 conventions ARE the
identity; a same-label re-register with a different ``code_version`` is a 409). The shared
model-registration response envelope.

Register (idempotently) the governed desmoothing model + a model_version for this
``(code_version, alpha)`` identity (OD-PA-1-E — the declared alpha IS part of the identity; a
same-label re-register with a different declaration is a 409; an out-of-domain alpha is a
422). The shared model-registration response envelope.

Register (idempotently) an AR1_ESTIMATED desmoothing version (DS-2, OD-DS-2-A): alpha is
ESTIMATED IN-RUN (alpha-hat = 1 - rho-hat_1 + the Bartlett band); the convention +
min_periods + band_convention are REGISTRAR-STAMPED. Same-label different-declaration is a
governed 409. Runs via the existing ``POST /perf/desmoothed-returns/runs``.

Register (idempotently) an OKUNEV_WHITE_ITERATIVE desmoothing version (DS-2, OD-DS-2-B):
the deterministic higher-order filter; the convention + ow_max_order are REGISTRAR-STAMPED;
its rows carry alpha NULL. Same-label different-declaration is a governed 409. Runs via the
existing ``POST /perf/desmoothed-returns/runs``.

Register (idempotently) the governed portfolio-return model + a model_version for this
``code_version`` identity and return its id (OD-PM-1-D — the v1 conventions ARE the identity; a
same-label re-register with a different ``code_version`` is a 409). No numeric parameters.

get.description:
API-1 entity/time read: portfolio-return rows across COMPLETED runs, filtered by
``portfolio_id`` and/or an ``as_of`` run cutoff (the pacing template; silent-empty on a foreign
id). Each row carries ``calculation_run_id`` — cross-run aggregation is a CONSUMER ERROR.

schema.title: Response List Portfolio Returns By Entity Endpoint Perf Portfolio Returns Get

get.summary: List Portfolio Returns By Entity Endpoint

get.description:
API-1 latest-resolver: the newest COMPLETED portfolio-return run's rows for the portfolio
(empty list when none), as of an optional run cutoff.

schema.title: Response Latest Portfolio Return Endpoint Perf Portfolio Returns Latest Get

post.description:
Run a governed portfolio-return calculation. A pre-create refusal raises + rolls back (no
run — incl. fewer than two boundaries, a multi-portfolio book, a NULL/unmappable flow currency,
a missing FX leg, or a non-positive begin MV / Dietz denominator, 422/404/409); a post-create
FAILED run is committed (``status='FAILED'``, zero rows — the magnitude gate).

get.description:
Read a portfolio-return run + its series rows (tenant-scoped; read-only). A committed FAILED
run (zero rows) is surfaced with ``status='FAILED'`` (durable refusal evidence), NOT a 404.
Read a single ``portfolio_return_result`` row (tenant-scoped; read-only).

List the tenant's performance runs, newest first (the perf family only; read-only;
fail-closed filters — an unknown ``run_type``/``status`` or out-of-bounds page is a 422, never a
silently-empty page). The query param is ``status`` (aliased — the FastAPI ``status`` module
shadows the name).

Read-only as-of holdings for a portfolio (or its bounded subtree). Composes captured position
(+ optional display-only valuation) FR reads; computes nothing; emits no audit/lineage.

The node's descendants (subtree, excluding itself), bounded + tenant-scoped. Records future
ABAC subtree semantics; enforces nothing (anchor-not-enforce).

schema.title: Response Get Portfolio Tree Portfolios  Portfolio Id  Tree Get

get.description: List CURRENT-HEAD positions (open on both axes). Filter-only — NO sum/net/aggregate.
Single-position bitemporal as-of read (read-only; NO aggregation / holdings view).

post.description: Book an as-known restatement of the given version (prior content never mutated).
Book a new effective-dated version for the (portfolio, instrument) of the current head.

get.description: The as-of head price for each price_date in [from, to] for a logical key — read-only.

post.description:
Capture a price (governed: VENDOR-source ORIGIN lineage + MARKET.PRICE_CREATE + the DQ
gate).

get.description: The single head price for a logical key as-of (valid_at, known_at) — 404 if none.

post.description:
As-known vendor restatement of a specific price_point version (same valid period + logical
key).
Effective-dated re-price for the SAME logical key of an existing head.

get.description:
The current-head proxy blend for one private instrument (all OPEN factor loadings; the
residual 1 − Σweight is NOT computed — a partial proxy is honest).

schema.title: Response List Proxy Mappings Endpoint Proxy Mappings Get

post.description:
Capture the first open proxy weight for (private_instrument, factor) — a MANUAL_PROXY
ORIGIN edge + MARKET.PROXY_MAPPING_CREATE + the DQ gate. Both FK targets are re-resolved
tenant-filtered pre-write (a foreign/absent instrument or factor is a 422).

get.description:
The proxy weight for (instrument, factor) true at ``valid_at`` as known at ``known_at`` (the
both-axes bitemporal read). 404 if no version covers both instants.

post.description:
As-known (system-time) correction of the proxy weight for (private_instrument, factor): close
the head's system_to + insert a corrected version over the SAME valid window with a
restatement_reason (MARKET.PROXY_MAPPING_CORRECTION). Prior content is never mutated (TR-08).

PA-3 (OD-PA-3-E): promote a REVIEWED governed proxy-weight estimate into a live captured
REGRESSION-method proxy weight. Resolves the cited run to a tenant-visible COMPLETED
PROXY_WEIGHT_ESTIMATE run (the run-TYPE gate), then captures the weight the analyst chose citing
it. A MANUAL weight uses the plain capture endpoint; a REGRESSION weight comes ONLY through
here.

Effective-dated re-capture of the proxy weight for (private_instrument, factor): close the
head's valid_to (MARKET.PROXY_MAPPING_UPDATE) + insert a new version — a proxy REVISION.

``scope_portfolio_id`` + an optional native ``benchmark_id`` and ``as_of`` run cutoff.
Silent-empty on a foreign/NULL-scope id. Each row carries ``calculation_run_id``.

metric row(s), optionally for one ``benchmark_id``). Empty when none.

schema.title: Response Latest Active Risk Endpoint Risk Active Risk Latest Get

post.description:
Run a governed ex-ante active-risk (tracking-error) calculation. A pre-create refusal raises
+ rolls back (no run — incl. an uncovered exposure factor, a NULL/unmappable constituent
currency, or a non-positive benchmark weight sum, 422); a post-create FAILED run is committed
(``status='FAILED'``, zero rows — the OD-P3-5-G non-PSD radicand gate + a magnitude gate).

get.description:
Read an active-risk run + its summary row (tenant-scoped; read-only). A committed FAILED run
(zero rows) is surfaced with ``status='FAILED'`` (durable refusal evidence), NOT a 404.
Read a single ``active_risk_result`` row (tenant-scoped; read-only).

API-1 latest-resolver (Class B): the newest COMPLETED covariance run's FULL matrix (empty
when none). A covariance run IS the matrix identity — no entity sub-filter; rows present in
canonical pair order. Each row carries ``calculation_run_id``.

schema.title: Response Latest Covariances Endpoint Risk Covariances Latest Get

post.description:
Run a governed sample-covariance estimation. A pre-create refusal raises + rolls back (no
run — incl. a short/misaligned window, 409); a post-create FAILED run is committed
(``status='FAILED'``, zero rows — the defensive output-sanity gate).

get.description:
Read a covariance run + its matrix rows (tenant-scoped; read-only). A committed FAILED run
(zero rows) is surfaced with ``status='FAILED'`` (durable refusal evidence), NOT a 404.
Read a single ``covariance_result`` row (tenant-scoped; read-only).

API-1 entity/time read: rows across COMPLETED runs filtered by entity + an optional
``as_of`` run cutoff (silent-empty on a foreign id). Each row carries ``calculation_run_id`` —
cross-run aggregation is a CONSUMER ERROR.

get.description: API-1 latest-resolver: the newest COMPLETED run's rows for the entity (empty when none).

schema.title: Response Latest Es Backtests Endpoint Risk Es Backtests Latest Get

post.description:
Run a governed AS ES backtest (BT-3). A pre-create refusal raises + rolls back (no run —
incl. a sibling snapshot/confidence mismatch, a non-bijective pairing, a stray metric_type,
a per-leg model-version mix, ES <= 0, or any BT-1-class alignment failure; 422/404/409); a
post-create FAILED run is committed (the magnitude gate).

get.description:
Read an es-backtest run + its result rows (tenant-scoped; read-only). A committed FAILED
run (zero rows) is surfaced with ``status='FAILED'``, NOT a 404.
Read a single ES-backtest ``var_backtest_result`` row (tenant-scoped; read-only).

API-1 entity/time read: rows across COMPLETED runs filtered by entity + an optional
``as_of`` run cutoff (silent-empty on a foreign id). Each row carries ``calculation_run_id`` —
cross-run aggregation is a CONSUMER ERROR.

schema.title: Response List Factor Exposures By Entity Endpoint Risk Factor Exposures Get

get.summary: List Factor Exposures By Entity Endpoint

get.description: API-1 latest-resolver: the newest COMPLETED run's rows for the entity (empty when none).

schema.title: Response Latest Factor Exposures Endpoint Risk Factor Exposures Latest Get

post.description:
Run a governed factor-exposure allocation. A pre-create refusal raises + rolls back (no
run); a post-create FAILED run is committed (``status='FAILED'``, zero rows — an unmapped
atom, OD-P3-3-N).

get.description:
Read a factor-exposure run + its rows (tenant-scoped; read-only). A committed FAILED run
(zero rows) is surfaced with ``status='FAILED'`` (durable refusal evidence), NOT a 404.
Read a single ``factor_exposure_result`` row (tenant-scoped; read-only).

post.description:
Register (idempotently) the governed covariance model + a model_version for this
``(code_version, window_observations)`` pair and return its id (OD-P3-4-G — the window is
version identity; a same-label re-register with a different window OR code_version is a 409).
The response envelope is the shared registration shape.

Register (idempotently) the governed AS ES-backtest model + a model_version for this
``(code_version, significance)`` identity (BT-3, OD-BT-3-B/D — the verdict domain
(0.9750, 250) is REGISTRAR-STAMPED, never caller-suppliable; an off-vocabulary significance
is a 422; a same-label different-declaration is a 409).

Register (idempotently) the governed factor-exposure allocation model + a model_version for
this ``code_version`` and return its id — so a run can bind a REGISTERED model_version
(OD-P3-3-G; the sensitivity-registration shape and response envelope).

Register (idempotently) the governed LOADINGS factor-exposure model + a model_version for
this ``code_version`` (FL-1, OD-FL-1-D) — the run endpoint is the SHARED
``POST /risk/factor-exposures/runs`` (the binder dispatches on the bound model).

Register (idempotently) the governed PROXY factor-exposure model + a model_version for this
``code_version`` (PA-2, OD-PA-2-A) — the run endpoint is the SHARED
``POST /risk/factor-exposures/runs`` (the binder dispatches on the bound model).

Register (idempotently) an EWMA residual-variance version of the proxy-weight family (RS-1,
OD-RS-1-A). The estimator convention + decay_lambda are REGISTRAR-STAMPED; a same-label
re-register with a different declaration is a governed 409. Runs via the existing
``POST /risk/proxy-weight-estimates/runs`` (dispatch is on the bound version).
post.summary: Register Proxy Weight Ewma Model Endpoint

post.description:
Register (idempotently) the governed proxy-weight regression model + a model_version for this
``(code_version, min_observations)`` identity (PA-3, OD-PA-3-D) — a same-label re-register with
a different code_version OR floor is a governed 409 conflict. The run endpoint is
``POST /risk/proxy-weight-estimates/runs``.

Register (idempotently) an empirical-Bayes shrinkage version of the proxy-weight family
(RS-1, OD-RS-1-B). Method-as-identity: the convention is REGISTRAR-STAMPED, NO numeric intensity
(the per-instrument w_i are computed + pin-reproduced). Runs via
``POST /risk/residual-shrinkage/runs``.
post.summary: Register Proxy Weight Shrinkage Eb Model Endpoint

post.description:
Register (idempotently) the governed scenario model + a model_version for this
``code_version`` identity and return its id (a same-label re-register with a different
``code_version`` is a 409).

Register (idempotently) the governed analytic-sensitivity model + a model_version for this
``code_version`` and return its id — so a run can bind a REGISTERED model_version
(OD-P3-1-M).

Register (idempotently) the governed parametric-VaR model + a model_version for this
``(code_version, confidence_level, horizon_days)`` identity and return its id (OD-P3-5-D —
the declarations are version identity; a same-label re-register with a different declaration
is a 409; a confidence outside the v1 vocabulary is a 422). The shared registration
envelope.

Register (idempotently) the governed VaR-backtesting model + a model_version for this
``(code_version, alpha)`` identity and return its id (OD-BT-1-A — the DECLARED alpha is part
of the version identity; a same-label re-register with a different declaration is a 409; an
off-vocabulary alpha is a 422).

Register (idempotently) the Christoffersen v2 of ``risk.var_backtest`` (BT-3, OD-BT-3-E:
``independence=CHRISTOFFERSEN_MARKOV`` is REGISTRAR-STAMPED; the shipped v1 stays
byte-preserved via the absent-convention grandfather). Runs ride the EXISTING
``POST /risk/var-backtests/runs``.

Register (idempotently) the governed parametric-Expected-Shortfall model (ES-1 — the
alpha-tail mean, ``ES_c = k_c * sigma_p``, over the SAME governed factor sigma as the plain
parametric VaR family) + a model_version for this ``(code_version, confidence_level,
horizon_days, z, es_multiplier)`` identity, and return its id. Dispatched through the SAME
``POST /risk/vars/runs`` endpoint as every VaR family — the binder resolves the bound model's
code. A same-label re-register with a different declaration is a 409; a confidence outside the
vocabulary or a non-v1 horizon is a 422. The shared registration envelope.

Register (idempotently) the governed TOTAL parametric-Expected-Shortfall model (ES-1 —
``ES_c = k_c * sigma_total``, the registered multiplier over PA-4's factor+idiosyncratic sigma,
carrying BT-2's staleness gate) + a model_version for this ``(code_version, confidence_level,
horizon_days, z, es_multiplier, appraisal_days, max_estimate_age_days)`` identity, and return
its id. Dispatched through the SAME ``POST /risk/vars/runs`` endpoint. A same-label re-register
with a different declaration is a 409; a confidence outside the vocabulary, a non-v1 horizon or
a non-positive ``appraisal_days``/``max_estimate_age_days`` is a 422.

Register (idempotently) the governed historical-simulation VaR model + a model_version
for this (code_version, confidence_level, horizon_days, window_observations,
quantile_convention) identity (OD-VHS-B). Same-label different-declaration = 409; an
out-of-vocabulary confidence, non-v1 horizon, or a window below the OD-VHS-E adequacy
floor = 422. The shared registration envelope.

Register (idempotently) the governed historical-simulation ES model + a model_version
for this (code_version, confidence_level, horizon_days, window_observations,
estimator_convention) identity (ES-HS-1, OD-B — the estimator convention is
REGISTRAR-STAMPED, never caller-suppliable). Same-label different-declaration = 409; an
out-of-vocabulary confidence, non-v1 horizon, or a window below the shared adequacy
floor = 422. The shared registration envelope.

Register (idempotently) the governed total-parametric-VaR model (PA-4 — factor variance +
the idiosyncratic residual of the proxied instruments' cited proxy-weight estimates) + a
model_version for this ``(code_version, confidence_level, horizon_days, appraisal_days,
max_estimate_age_days)`` identity (BT-2: **v2** — the declared staleness policy joined the
identity) and return its id. Dispatched through the SAME ``POST /risk/vars/runs`` endpoint as
the plain parametric family — the binder resolves the bound model's code. A same-label
re-register with a different declaration is a 409; a confidence outside the v1 vocabulary or a
non-positive ``appraisal_days``/``max_estimate_age_days`` is a 422. The shared registration
envelope.

get.description:
API-1 entity/time read: rows across COMPLETED runs filtered by entity + an optional
``as_of`` run cutoff (silent-empty on a foreign id). Each row carries ``calculation_run_id`` —
cross-run aggregation is a CONSUMER ERROR.

schema.title: Response List Proxy Weight Estimates By Entity Endpoint Risk Proxy Weight Estimates Get

get.summary: List Proxy Weight Estimates By Entity Endpoint

get.description: API-1 latest-resolver: the newest COMPLETED run's rows for the entity (empty when none).

schema.title: Response Latest Proxy Weight Estimates Endpoint Risk Proxy Weight Estimates Latest Get

post.description:
Run a governed proxy-weight OLS estimation. A pre-create refusal raises + rolls back (no
run); a post-create FAILED run (the magnitude gate) is committed with ``status='FAILED'`` + zero
rows (durable refusal evidence).

get.description:
Read a proxy-weight-estimate run + its rows (tenant-scoped; read-only). A committed FAILED
run (zero rows) is surfaced with ``status='FAILED'`` (durable refusal evidence), NOT a 404.

Read a single ``proxy_weight_estimate_result`` row by id (tenant-scoped; read-only) — the
API-1 by-id parity read closing the house-pattern asymmetry.

post.description:
Run a governed empirical-Bayes residual shrinkage for one target instrument (RS-1,
OD-RS-1-B). Pins the whole comparable cohort's raw estimates, recomputes every w_i from the pin,
and persists ONE shrunk ESTIMATION_SUMMARY carrying the target's regression identity (promotes
like a raw estimate). A pre-create refusal raises + rolls back (no run).

get.description:
List the tenant's risk runs, newest first (the SIX risk families only; read-only;
fail-closed filters — an unknown ``run_type``/``status`` or out-of-bounds page is a 422,
never a silently-empty page). The query param is ``status`` (aliased here — the FastAPI
``status`` module shadows the name).

API-1 latest-resolver (Class B): the newest COMPLETED scenario run's rows, optionally pinned
to a ``scenario_definition_id`` (empty when none). A scenario run computes ONE definition, so
the filter selects runs of that scenario. Each row carries ``calculation_run_id``.

schema.title: Response Latest Scenario Results Endpoint Risk Scenario Results Latest Get

get.description:
Read a single ``scenario_result`` row by id (tenant-scoped; read-only) — the API-1 by-id
parity read closing the house-pattern asymmetry.

post.description:
Run a governed factor-shock scenario. A pre-create refusal raises + rolls back (no run —
422/404/409); a post-create FAILED run is committed (``status='FAILED'``, zero rows — the
magnitude gate).

get.description:
Read a scenario run + its result rows (tenant-scoped; read-only). A committed FAILED run
(zero rows) is surfaced with ``status='FAILED'``, NOT a 404.
List the tenant's scenario definitions (read-only).

schema.title: Response List Scenarios Risk Scenarios Get

post.description:
Create a versioned scenario definition (EV; ``risk.run``-gated — defining IS the running
persona's action). An out-of-vocab ``scenario_type`` is 422; a duplicate ``code`` is 409.

get.description: The current-head shock set of a scenario (read-only).

schema.title: Response List Shocks Risk Scenarios  Scenario Id  Shocks Get

post.description:
Capture the first open shock for a (scenario, factor). Vocab/finiteness/CURRENCY-scope are
422; a duplicate open shock is a discriminated 409.

get.description: The bitemporal reconstruct of one shock (read-only). 404 if no version covers both.

post.description: As-known (system-time) correction of a shock (TR-08; a restatement_reason is required).

Effective-dated re-capture of a shock (valid-time). A backdated ``effective_at`` (window
incoherence, MD-H1) is 422; no open head is 409.
In-place EV re-version of a scenario header (``record_version`` bump).

get.description:
API-1 latest-resolver (Class B): the newest COMPLETED sensitivity run's rows, optionally
row-filtered to a ``curve_id`` (empty when none). A sensitivity run is curve-intrinsic (no
portfolio/instrument entity); the whole run — or the queried curve's slice of it — is the
readable unit. Each row carries ``calculation_run_id``.

schema.title: Response Latest Sensitivities Endpoint Risk Sensitivities Latest Get

post.description:
Run a governed analytic-sensitivity calculation. A pre-create refusal raises + rolls back
(no
run); a post-create FAILED run is committed (``status='FAILED'``, zero rows).

get.description:
Read a sensitivity run + its rows (tenant-scoped; read-only). A committed FAILED run (zero
rows) is surfaced with ``status='FAILED'`` (durable refusal evidence), NOT a 404.
Read a single ``sensitivity_result`` row (tenant-scoped; read-only).

API-1 entity/time read: rows across COMPLETED runs filtered by entity + an optional
``as_of`` run cutoff (silent-empty on a foreign id). Each row carries ``calculation_run_id`` —
cross-run aggregation is a CONSUMER ERROR.

schema.title: Response List Var Backtests By Entity Endpoint Risk Var Backtests Get

get.summary: List Var Backtests By Entity Endpoint

get.description: API-1 latest-resolver: the newest COMPLETED run's rows for the entity (empty when none).

schema.title: Response Latest Var Backtests Endpoint Risk Var Backtests Latest Get

post.description:
Run a governed VaR backtest. A pre-create refusal raises + rolls back (no run — incl. an
unpaired forecast, a horizon mismatch, mixed methods, a broken MV chain, or a cross-portfolio
identity failure, 422/404/409); a post-create FAILED run is committed (``status='FAILED'``,
zero rows — the magnitude gate).

get.description:
Read a var-backtest run + its result rows (tenant-scoped; read-only). A committed FAILED
run (zero rows) is surfaced with ``status='FAILED'`` (durable refusal evidence), NOT a 404.
Read a single ``var_backtest_result`` row (tenant-scoped; read-only).

API-1b entity read (Class C): governed VaR rows resolved via the run's ROOT
``scope_portfolio_id`` (``var_result`` carries no portfolio) + an optional ``metric_type``
(parametric/total/HS/ES) and ``as_of`` run cutoff. Silent-empty on a foreign/NULL-scope id.
Each row carries ``calculation_run_id`` — cross-run aggregation is a CONSUMER ERROR.

schema.title: Response List Vars By Entity Endpoint Risk Vars Get

post.description:
Run a governed historical-simulation calculation — EITHER family, dispatched on the
bound model (VAR-HS-1: ``risk.var.historical`` ⇒ ``metric_type='VAR_HISTORICAL'``;
ES-HS-1: ``risk.var.historical_es`` ⇒ ``metric_type='ES_HISTORICAL'``, the empirical
tail mean). A pre-create refusal raises + rolls back (no run, 422/404/409); a post-create
FAILED run is committed (``status='FAILED'``, zero rows — the magnitude gate). The run +
row read back through the EXISTING ``GET /risk/vars/runs/{run_id}`` /
``GET /risk/vars/{var_id}`` (same run family + result table;
``z_score``/``sigma``/``covariance_run_id`` honestly null for both metrics).

get.description:
API-1b latest-resolver: the newest COMPLETED VaR run scoped to the portfolio (its metric
row(s), or the one ``metric_type``) — the flagship 'latest VaR for portfolio P' read. Empty
when the portfolio has no scoped COMPLETED run (a snapshot-consume-rooted or pre-0046 run is
honestly unresolvable).

schema.title: Response Latest Var Endpoint Risk Vars Latest Get

post.description:
Run a governed parametric-VaR calculation. A pre-create refusal raises + rolls back (no
run — incl. an uncovered exposure factor, 422); a post-create FAILED run is committed
(``status='FAILED'``, zero rows — the OD-P3-5-G non-PSD radicand gate).

get.description:
Read a VaR run + its summary row (tenant-scoped; read-only). A committed FAILED run (zero
rows) is surfaced with ``status='FAILED'`` (durable refusal evidence), NOT a 404.
Read a single ``var_result`` row (tenant-scoped; read-only).

API-1 F2 listing: snapshot HEADERS under the caller's tenant, optionally filtered by
``purpose`` and/or ``as_of_valuation_date`` (silent-empty on no match; newest-first). Headers
only — the components + verify stay on the by-id reads. RLS-scoped.

schema.title: Response List Snapshots Endpoint Snapshots Get

post.description: Build one immutable reproducible input snapshot over the bound portfolio subtree.

get.description: Read a snapshot header + its pinned components (read-only).
Re-resolve every pinned component and report drift (read-only; emits no audit event).

post.description: Book a reversal record against the original (immutable — the original is never mutated).

get.description: List CURRENT-HEAD marks (open on both axes). Filter-only — NO sum/net/aggregate/rollup.
Single-valuation bitemporal as-of read (read-only; NO aggregation / holdings view).

post.description: Book an as-known restatement of the given mark version (prior content never mutated).
Book a new effective-dated re-mark for the head's (portfolio, instrument, valuation_date).
